name: Team Carousel
description: Horizontally-scrolling team carousel with peek. Snap-x cards, prev/next arrows in the header on desktop, keyboard arrow-key support, mobile-friendly swipe with arrows below the strip.

descriptions.descriptive: A scroll-snap carousel of fixed-width team cards (320px default, configurable via `cardWidth`) that peek into the viewport so the user understands there are more members to swipe to. Each card shows a 4:5 portrait, a small meta chip (department, location, tenure), and a clean text block. Desktop shows prev/next arrows in the section header that disable at the ends; mobile shows the same arrows under the carousel and supports native horizontal swipe. The track is keyboard-focusable and responds to arrow keys.
descriptions.usage: Use when a team is too big to grid (more than ~10 people) or when the team page needs more energy than a static grid. Place after a brand-statement hero or under a leadership grid as a 'meet the rest of the team' beat. Avoid pairing with another horizontal-scroll carousel — same gesture twice in a row reads as filler.
descriptions.audienceFit: Mid-size studios and agencies, growth-stage startups, healthcare clinics with many practitioners, hospitality groups with multi-location staff, and any segment where the team is meaningfully large but each member still matters.
